details: Reading SFPU kernel sources for leaky_relu: found _calculate_lrelu_ in ckernel_sfpu_relu.h (both WH and BH). WH uses ADDR_MOD_3, BH uses ADDR_MOD_7.
Writing leaky_relu_analysis.md with full SFPU kernel trace

Traced SELU SFPU chain: selu_tile -> llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_selu -> _llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_params_ -> calculate_selu -> _sfpu_exp_21f_<true>. Source tree uses _sfpu_exp_21f_bf16_ but build version uses _sfpu_exp_21f_ (renamed).
leaky_relu_analysis.md written to .claude/analysis/star_relu-1/. No commit per orchestrator instructions.
Wrote selu_analysis.md to .claude/analysis/star_relu-1/. Commit skipped per orchestrator instructions.
